name: PSOA GL Statement
html:
{%- set company = filters.get("company") -%} {%- set party = filters.get("party") -%} {%- set from_date = filters.get("from_date") -%} {%- set to_date = filters.get("to_date") -%} {%- set currency = filters.get("presentation_currency") or filters.get("currency") or frappe.db.get_value("Company", company, "default_currency") -%} {%- set show_rem = filters.get("show_remarks") -%} {%- set cust = frappe.db.get_value("Customer", party, ["customer_name", "tax_id"], as_dict=True) or frappe._dict() -%} {%- set addr_links = frappe.db.get_all("Dynamic Link", filters={"link_doctype": "Customer", "link_name": party, "parenttype": "Address"}, fields=["parent"], limit=1) -%} {%- set address_line = "" -%} {%- if addr_links -%} {%- set a = frappe.db.get_value("Address", addr_links[0].parent, ["address_line1", "city", "country"], as_dict=True) or frappe._dict() -%} {%- set parts = [] -%} {%- if a.address_line1 %}{%- set _ = parts.append(a.address_line1) %}{%- endif -%} {%- if a.city %}{%- set _ = parts.append(a.city) %}{%- endif -%} {%- if a.country %}{%- set _ = parts.append(a.country) %}{%- endif -%} {%- set address_line = parts | join(", ") -%} {%- endif -%} {%- set cont_links = frappe.db.get_all("Dynamic Link", filters={"link_doctype": "Customer", "link_name": party, "parenttype": "Contact"}, fields=["parent"], limit=1) -%} {%- set c_phone = "" -%} {%- set c_email = "" -%} {%- if cont_links -%} {%- set c = frappe.db.get_value("Contact", cont_links[0].parent, ["phone", "email_id"], as_dict=True) or frappe._dict() -%} {%- set c_phone = c.phone or "" -%} {%- set c_email = c.email_id or "" -%} {%- endif -%} {%- set has_etr = frappe.get_meta("Sales Invoice").has_field("etr_invoice_number") and frappe.get_meta("Sales Invoice").has_field("cu_link") -%} {%- set ns = namespace(t_debit=0, t_credit=0) -%} {%- for row in data -%} {%- set ns.t_debit = ns.t_debit + (row.get("debit") or 0) -%} {%- set ns.t_credit = ns.t_credit + (row.get("credit") or 0) -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- set future_rows = [] -%} {%- for row in data -%} {%- if row.get("posting_date") and to_date and row.get("posting_date") > to_date -%} {%- set _ = future_rows.append(row) -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- if letter_head -%}
{{ letter_head }}
{%- else -%}
{{ company }}
Statement of Account
 Period: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(from_date) }} – {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(to_date) }}
Printed: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(frappe.utils.today()) }}
{%- endif -%}
{{ cust.customer_name or party }} {%- if cust.tax_id -%}Tax ID: {{ cust.tax_id }}{%- endif -%} {%- if address_line -%}{{ address_line }}{%- endif -%} {%- if c_phone -%}Tel: {{ c_phone }}{%- endif -%} {%- if c_email -%}{{ c_email }}{%- endif -%} Currency: {{ currency }}
{%- if show_rem -%}{%- endif -%} {%- for row in data -%} {%- if show_rem -%}{%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
Date Type ReferenceRemarksDebit Credit Balance
{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(row.get("posting_date")) }} {{ row.get("voucher_type") or "" }} {{ row.get("voucher_no") or "" }} {%- if has_etr and row.get("voucher_type") == "Sales Invoice" -%} {%- set etr = frappe.db.get_value("Sales Invoice", row.get("voucher_no"), ["etr_invoice_number", "cu_link"], as_dict=True) -%} {%- if etr and etr.etr_invoice_number -%}
CUIN: {{ etr.etr_invoice_number }}
{%- endif -%} {%- endif -%} 		{{ row.get("remarks") or "" }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(row.get("debit") or 0, currency=currency) }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(row.get("credit") or 0, currency=currency) }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(row.get("balance") or 0, currency=currency) }}
Total {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(ns.t_debit, currency=currency) }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(ns.t_credit, currency=currency) }}
{%- if ageing -%}
Aging Summary
{%- set ag_total = (ageing.range1 or 0)+(ageing.range2 or 0)+(ageing.range3 or 0)+(ageing.range4 or 0)+(ageing.range5 or 0) -%}
0–3031–6061–9091–120120+Total
{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(ageing.range1 or 0, currency=currency) }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(ageing.range2 or 0, currency=currency) }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(ageing.range3 or 0, currency=currency) }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(ageing.range4 or 0, currency=currency) }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(ageing.range5 or 0, currency=currency) }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(ag_total, currency=currency) }}
{%- endif -%} {%- if future_rows -%}
Future Payments
{%- for row in future_rows -%} {%- endfor -%}
DateTypeReferenceAmount
{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(row.get("posting_date")) }} {{ row.get("voucher_type") or "" }} {{ row.get("voucher_no") or "" }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(row.get("credit") or 0, currency=currency) }}
{%- endif -%}
{%- if terms_and_conditions -%}
Terms & Conditions
{{ terms_and_conditions }}
{%- endif -%}
